[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A mobile game selection screen shows three gold banners with profile images and names, and a centered button to start a game.

The main focus is three vertical, gold-framed banners arranged side by side, each with a small rounded-rectangle photo preview at the top, a small red/white circular marker on the left side of each photo, a green “2ms” label above the photo, and a large stylized crest emblem near the lower middle of each banner.

Setting:
The scene appears to be an indoor, screen-based interface with a dark blue background and subtle decorative shapes, including curved vertical elements at the far left and right. The lighting is UI-like with gold highlights and a slightly glowing, metallic look.

Visual Details:
Each banner has a metallic gold outline with a pointed bottom and decorative wing-like shapes in gold. The top sections contain photo thumbnails: the left thumbnail shows two people indoors with one person facing away and the other partially visible; the middle thumbnail shows a person with short dark hair shown from behind or side while looking at another person; the right thumbnail shows close-up faces including one person kissing or leaning close toward another. Under each thumbnail is white text on the banners. Beneath the text are game-style crest icons in gold and purple tones. Above the middle banner’s top area there is a small circular red icon with a white “X” symbol; similar red icon with an “X” also appears above the right banner. A small white home-like icon appears above the left banner area. At the bottom center of the image there is a wide, gold, ribbon-shaped button with an ornate border and the text “Mulai Game.” The overall camera angle is straight-on, and the composition is symmetrical with the button centered below the three banners.

Visible Text:
CLASSIC
2ms
AcaaaSa
Classy 4TH
Zuan Dé Kaizev
Mulai Game
X (shown inside red circles)
No important visible text detected on icons besides “X”.

Practical Summary:
The image is a game lobby or selection screen showing three player cards with thumbnail photos, labels, and crest icons. A gold “Mulai Game” button is centered at the bottom for starting the game.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
